mapper.select:
SELECT d.*, COUNT(l.obj_id) AS likeCount FROM drink d
LEFT JOIN `like` l ON d.drink_id = l.obj_id AND l.obj_type = 'DRINK'
WHERE d.is_deleted = 'N'
GROUP BY d.drink_id ORDER BY likeCount DESC, d.created_at DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT d.*, cc1.code_name AS categoryName, cc2.code_name AS typeName, IFNULL(lc.likeCount, 0) AS likeCount,
CASE WHEN ul.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS liked
false AS liked
FROM drink d
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON d.category_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON d.type_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id, COUNT(*) AS likeCount FROM `like` WHERE obj_type = 'DRINK' GROUP BY obj_id ) lc ON d.drink_id = lc.obj_id
LEFT JOIN `like` ul ON ul.obj_id = d.drink_id AND ul.obj_type = 'DRINK' AND ul.user_id = #{userId}
INNER JOIN ( SELECT d1.drink_id FROM drink d1 WHERE d1.is_deleted = 'N' AND d1.drink_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d2.drink_id FROM drink d2 WHERE d2.is_deleted = 'N' AND d2.drink_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d3.drink_id FROM drink d3 INNER JOIN common_code c1 ON d3.category_code = c1.code AND c1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND c1.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE d3.is_deleted = 'N' AND c1.code_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d4.drink_id FROM drink d4 INNER JOIN common_code c2 ON d4.type_code = c2.code AND c2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND c2.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE d4.is_deleted = 'N' AND c2.code_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') ) s ON d.drink_id = s.drink_id
WHERE d.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY IFNULL(lc.likeCount, 0) DESC, d.drink_id DESC
ORDER BY d.drink_name ASC
ORDER BY d.drink_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drink d
INNER JOIN (
SELECT d1.drink_id FROM drink d1 WHERE d1.is_deleted = 'N' AND d1.drink_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d2.drink_id FROM drink d2 WHERE d2.is_deleted = 'N' AND d2.drink_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d3.drink_id FROM drink d3 INNER JOIN common_code c1 ON d3.category_code = c1.code AND c1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND c1.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE d3.is_deleted = 'N' AND c1.code_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d4.drink_id FROM drink d4 INNER JOIN common_code c2 ON d4.type_code = c2.code AND c2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND c2.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE d4.is_deleted = 'N' AND c2.code_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')
) s ON d.drink_id = s.drink_id
WHERE d.is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT d.*, cc1.code_name AS categoryName, cc2.code_name AS typeName, IFNULL(lc.likeCount, 0) AS likeCount,
CASE WHEN ul.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS liked
false AS liked
FROM drink d
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON d.category_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON d.type_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id, COUNT(*) AS likeCount FROM `like` WHERE obj_type = 'DRINK' GROUP BY obj_id ) lc ON d.drink_id = lc.obj_id
LEFT JOIN `like` ul ON ul.obj_id = d.drink_id AND ul.obj_type = 'DRINK' AND ul.user_id = #{userId}
WHERE d.is_deleted = 'N'
AND d.category_code = #{categoryCode}
AND d.abv BETWEEN #{abvLow} AND #{abvHigh} AND d.price BETWEEN #{priceLow} AND #{priceHigh}
ORDER BY IFNULL(lc.likeCount, 0) DESC, d.drink_id DESC
ORDER BY d.drink_name ASC
ORDER BY d.drink_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT d.*, cc1.code_name AS categoryName, cc2.code_name AS typeName,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasting_note tn WHERE tn.drink_id = d.drink_id AND tn.is_deleted = 'N' ) AS noteCount,
( SELECT ROUND(AVG(tn.rating), 1) FROM tasting_note tn WHERE tn.drink_id = d.drink_id AND tn.is_deleted = 'N' ) AS avgRating,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` l WHERE l.obj_type = 'DRINK' AND l.obj_id = d.drink_id ) AS likeCount FROM drink d
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON d.category_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON d.type_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE d.drink_id = #{drinkId} AND d.is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drink ( category_code, type_code, drink_name, drink_name_en, abv, price, country, description, created_at ) VALUES ( #{categoryCode}, #{typeCode}, #{drinkName}, #{drinkNameEn}, #{abv}, #{price}, #{country}, #{description}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM drink WHERE is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY drink_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE drink SET category_code = #{categoryCode}, type_code = #{typeCode}, drink_name = #{drinkName}, drink_name_en = #{drinkNameEn}, abv = #{abv}, price = #{price}, country = #{country}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE drink_id = #{drinkId}
UPDATE drink SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE drink_id = #{drinkId}
